testcase.name: test_fulfill_drains_oldest_and_propagates

failure.message: AssertionError: {'material_id': 'c4b3b488-011b-4fdb-a4b7-c5f3c76033d1', 'updated_manufactured': 0, 'updated_pos': 0} assert 0 >= 1 + where 0 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfed55f533540>('updated_manufactured', 0) + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfed55f533540> = {'material_id': 'c4b3b488-011b-4fdb-a4b7-c5f3c76033d1', 'updated_manufactured': 0, 'updated_pos': 0}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_fifo_fulfill_propagation_iter173.py:165: in test_fulfill_drains_oldest_and_propagates assert tomato_entry.get("updated_manufactured", 0) >= 1, tomato_entry E AssertionError: {'material_id': 'c4b3b488-011b-4fdb-a4b7-c5f3c76033d1', 'updated_manufactured': 0, 'updated_pos': 0} E assert 0 >= 1 E + where 0 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfed55f533540>('updated_manufactured', 0) E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfed55f533540> = {'material_id': 'c4b3b488-011b-4fdb-a4b7-c5f3c76033d1', 'updated_manufactured': 0, 'updated_pos': 0}.get

testcase.name: test_helper_updates_test_product_when_called_directly
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_fifo_fulfill_propagation_iter173.py:304: in test_helper_updates_test_product_when_called_directly loop.run_until_complete(runner()) /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:654: in run_until_complete return future.result() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_fifo_fulfill_propagation_iter173.py:287: in runner assert res["updated_manufactured"] >= 1, res E AssertionError: {'updated_manufactured': 0, 'updated_pos': 0} E assert 0 >= 1
